scripts.build: bun run prebuild && bun run build-db && bun run build:packages
scripts.build:packages: cd packages/types && bun run build && cd ../db && bun run build && cd ../utils && bun run build && cd ../params && bun run build && cd ../monitoring && bun run build && cd ../executor && bun run build && cd ../api && bun run build && cd ../node && bun run build && cd ../cli && bun run build
scripts.build:workspace: bun run --filter '@skandha/types' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/db' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/utils' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/params' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/monitoring' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/executor' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/api' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/node' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/cli' build
scripts.build:parallel: bun run --filter '@skandha/types' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/db' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/utils' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/params' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/monitoring' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/executor' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/api' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/node' build && bun run --filter '@skandha/cli' build
